description: Where the world's greatest skylines slip their foundations and drift upward like a child's lost balloons, each tower a luminous vessel carrying the dreams of sleepless cities into the velvet dark.

learnings.pattern_analysis: Skyscrapers transform naturally into balloon shapes by adding rounded tops (ellipses) and curved corners (rx/ry), while maintaining vertical proportions that evoke architectural height. The string elements create visual anchoring that paradoxically emphasizes the floating quality.
learnings.color_notes: The dark #0D1B2A background creates dramatic contrast for the vibrant balloon-buildings. Yellow (#FFE66D) window lights read as both architectural detail and balloon surface highlights. The radial gradients with 30% offset create convincing spherical volume on rectangular forms.
learnings.animation_insights: Staggered float animations (3s, 4s, 5s) with varying delays create organic cluster movement like a bouquet of balloons. The twinkle effect on windows serves dual purpose: simulating lit/unlit cycles and adding celebratory sparkle. Glow animation on select buildings creates focal hierarchy.
learnings.composition_principles: Four city clusters distributed across the canvas maintain skyline recognition while creating balloon-bouquet groupings. Leaving upper 40% relatively empty preserves night sky atmosphere and negative space. Small floating accent balloons fill gaps without overcrowding, enhancing the celebration theme.
